title: Analytical Size-Exclusion Chromatography of ATG2A–WIPI4 Complex
author: Elisabeth Holzer

steps.title: Protein Sample Preparation
steps.instruction: Prepare a protein mixture containing 4 micromolar (µM) ATG2A and 4.8 micromolar (µM) WIPI4 in SEC buffer to a final volume of 50 µL.

steps.title: Protein Sample Preparation
steps.instruction: Incubate the protein mixture on ice for 02:00:00 to allow complex formation.

steps.title: Protein Sample Preparation
steps.instruction: For control runs, prepare separate samples of ATG2A only and WIPI4 only at the same concentrations and volume.

steps.title: SEC Run
steps.instruction: Inject 50 µL of the protein mixture or control sample onto the equilibrated Superose 6 Increase 3.2/300 column (Cytiva, Cat# 29091598). Pre-equilibrated with performed with SEC buffer.

steps.title: SEC Run
steps.instruction: Collect 100 µL fractions throughout the elution. Record the chromatogram for later comparison between mixture and controls.

steps.title: Western Blot Analysis
steps.instruction: Analyze collected fractions by Western blot. Detect ATG2A (anti-ATG2A Proteintech Catalog #23226-1-AP (RRID: AB_2879235)) and HIS-tagged WIPI4 (anti-HIS Qiagen Catalog #34660 (RRID: AB_2619735)) using specific antibodies.
